title: Marcus Makes a Mess
synopsis: When Marcus tries to help make pancakes in the kitchen, everything goes wonderfully wrong in the most delicious way possible.

pages.text: Marcus wanted to help Mama make pancakes. "I can do it!" he said, climbing on his special step stool.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes stands on a wooden step stool in a cozy kitchen with warm yellow walls, reaching toward a bowl on the counter while his mother smiles nearby, flour containers and mixing bowls visible
illustration.alt: Marcus standing on step stool in kitchen wanting to help make pancakes

pages.text: Mama gave Marcus the flour. "Pour it slowly," she said. But Marcus was so excited! He dumped it all at once. POOF! White flour went everywhere!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes covered in white flour dust, laughing as flour clouds fill the cozy kitchen with warm orange lighting, flour scattered on counters and floor, his mother laughing in the background
illustration.alt: Marcus accidentally dumping flour everywhere in the kitchen

pages.text: "Oops!" giggled Marcus. He looked like a little snowman! Mama laughed too. "Let's try the eggs next," she said with a wink.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes dusted with flour, grinning widely in the cozy kitchen while his mother hands him an egg, both wearing aprons, warm yellow kitchen lighting creating a loving family moment
illustration.alt: Marcus covered in flour, smiling as Mama gives him an egg

pages.text: Marcus cracked the egg. SPLAT! Some went in the bowl, some went on the counter, and some went on his nose! "I'm getting good at this!" he announced proudly.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes with egg on his nose and flour in his hair, standing in the cozy kitchen with eggshells and batter splattered around, beaming with pride while mixing ingredients
illustration.alt: Marcus with egg on his nose, making a mess while cooking

pages.text: When the pancakes were done, Marcus and Mama sat down to eat. "These are the messiest, most delicious pancakes ever!" said Mama. Marcus agreed - cooking was the best!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting at a wooden dining table with his mother, both eating golden pancakes, the cozy kitchen in warm orange lighting behind them, steam rising from the pancakes, both smiling and enjoying their homemade meal together
illustration.alt: Marcus and Mama eating pancakes together at the kitchen table

metadata.illustrationStyle: cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food

questions.question: What did Marcus want to help make?
questions.explanation: Marcus wanted to help Mama make pancakes in the kitchen.

questions.question: What happened when Marcus poured the flour?
questions.explanation: Marcus was excited and dumped all the flour at once, making it go everywhere!

questions.question: Where did some of the egg go?
questions.explanation: When Marcus cracked the egg, some went on his nose and he thought he was getting good at cooking!

questions.question: How did Mama feel about the messy pancakes?
questions.explanation: Mama said they were the messiest, most delicious pancakes ever - she loved cooking with Marcus!
